name: io.github.nirholas/3d-agent-mcp
title: three.ws 3D Agent Tools
description: MCP tools from three.ws: free + paid text-to-3D, rigging, agent reputation, market intel.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_SVM_PAYMENT_ADDRESS
environmentVariables.description: Solana address that receives USDC when a client pays for a tool call (falls back to X402_PAY_TO_SOLANA / X402_PAY_TO). Required to settle paid tools.

environmentVariables.name: SOLANA_RPC_URL
environmentVariables.description: Solana mainnet RPC endpoint. Defaults to the public cluster — bring your own (Helius / QuickNode / Triton) for production traffic.

environmentVariables.name: HELIUS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional Helius API key — enables exact supply and richer DAS data in pump.fun snapshots.
